code:
%%{IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController}}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
title: SM-03.01 — Proposal Lifecycle (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic)

[IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode] --> DRAFT : ProposalCreated (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic)
note right of DRAFT
  Authoring & validation:
  • proposalId assigned
  • schema/policy checks
end note

DRAFT --> REVIEW : SubmittedForReview
note right of REVIEW
  Guard reviews (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic)
  Can request changes or reject
end note

REVIEW --> DRAFT : ChangesRequested
REVIEW --> REJECTED : RejectedAtReview
REVIEW --> OPEN_FOR_VOTE : ApprovedForVoting (IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode)

OPEN_FOR_VOTE --> OPEN_FOR_VOTE : VoteCast (IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController)
OPEN_FOR_VOTE --> TALLYING : VotingClosed

TALLYING --> DECIDED_APPROVED : VoteTallied → Approved (IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker)
TALLYING --> DECIDED_REJECTED : VoteTallied → Rejected (IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController)

DECIDED_APPROVED --> EXECUTION : DecisionRecorded (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic)
DECIDED_REJECTED --> ARCHIVED : DecisionRecorded (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic)

EXECUTION --> EXECUTED : PolicyChanged / GrantApproved / ProjectApproved (IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode)
EXECUTION --> EXECUTION_FAILED : ExecutionFailed

EXECUTION_FAILED --> APPEAL : AppealOpened (IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode)
EXECUTION_FAILED --> RETRY_EXEC : RetryAuthorized
RETRY_EXEC --> EXECUTION : ReExecute

EXECUTED --> AUDIT : ExecutionCompleted
AUDIT --> ARCHIVED : AuditLogged (IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream)

%% Appeals (IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream)
OPEN_FOR_VOTE --> APPEAL : AppealOpened (IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker)
DECIDED_APPROVED --> APPEAL : AppealOpened (IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController)
DECIDED_REJECTED --> APPEAL : AppealOpened (IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream)

APPEAL --> DECIDED_APPROVED : AppealResolved → uphold
APPEAL --> DECIDED_REJECTED : AppealResolved → overturn
APPEAL --> ARCHIVED : AppealWithdrawn

%% Cancellations
DRAFT --> CANCELLED : WithdrawnByAuthor
OPEN_FOR_VOTE --> CANCELLED : CancelledByAuthority
CANCELLED --> ARCHIVED : Archived

%% Terminal states
REJECTED --> [IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream]
ARCHIVED --> [IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream]

%% ===== Styling =====
classDef core fill:#ff8b00,stroke:#333,color:#fff,font-weight:bold;
class DRAFT,REVIEW,OPEN_FOR_VOTE,TALLYING,DECIDED_APPROVED,DECIDED_REJECTED,EXECUTION,EXECUTED,EXECUTION_FAILED,RETRY_EXEC,APPEAL,AUDIT,ARCHIVED,REJECTED,CANCELLED core;
repo_description: The cohersphere architecture — structural blueprint of the resonance network. Defines the modular layers connecting app, API, and governance protocols. Outlines data flows for Proof-of-Contribution, c

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为工业物联网PLC逻辑设计一个提案生命周期状态机。核心场景是：从边缘节点创建提案，经过评审、投票、执行，最终归档。关键组件包括EdgeNode、ActuatorController、MQTT Broker和TelemetryStream。
明白。我理解为这是一个跨组件协作的工作流：EdgeNode负责提案创建和投票阶段，ActuatorController参与投票和申诉，MQTT Broker处理结果广播，TelemetryStream负责审计追踪。起点是EdgeNode触发ProposalCreated事件吗？
对，ProposalCreated由EdgeNode发起，进入DRAFT状态。DRAFT阶段需要体现Authoring和validation，包括proposalId分配和策略检查。
好的，我添加DRAFT状态，并在右侧添加注释说明Authoring & validation的具体内容。接下来从DRAFT到哪个状态？
DRAFT通过SubmittedForReview转换到REVIEW状态。REVIEW阶段由Guard进行评审，他们可以要求修改或直接拒绝。注意这里还是PLC Logic在控制。
已添加REVIEW状态和转换。我注意到REVIEW有两个回退路径：ChangesRequested回到DRAFT，RejectedAtReview到终态。还有第三个路径是ApprovedForVoting？
没错，ApprovedForVoting会进入OPEN_FOR_VOTE状态，这里触发组件切换为EdgeNode。投票阶段允许持续投票，VoteCast是自循环转换。
VoteCast的自循环标注为ActuatorController触发，我理解对吗？因为实际投票操作是由执行器控制器处理的？
正确。VotingClosed后进入TALLYING计票状态。计票完成后有两个分支：Approved走MQTT Broker广播，Rejected由ActuatorController处理。
已添加TALLYING和两个DECIDED状态。DECIDED_APPROVED通过DecisionRecorded进入EXECUTION执行阶段，DECIDED_REJECTED直接归档。执行阶段有什么特殊设计？
EXECUTION是复杂状态。成功路径是PolicyChanged/GrantApproved/ProjectApproved到EXECUTED；失败路径是ExecutionFailed到EXECUTION_FAILED。EXECUTION_FAILED有两个出口：直接申诉，或者RetryAuthorized后重试。
重试路径是EXECUTION_FAILED → RETRY_EXEC → EXECUTION，由ReExecute触发？申诉路径是到APPEAL状态，由EdgeNode的AppealOpened触发？
完全正确。EXECUTED完成后进入AUDIT审计状态，最终由TelemetryStream的AuditLogged触发归档。
主流程已完整。现在处理申诉机制。我注意到APPEAL可以从多个状态进入：OPEN_FOR_VOTE、DECIDED_APPROVED、DECIDED_REJECTED，分别由不同组件触发？
是的，这是关键设计。OPEN_FOR_VOTE阶段申诉由MQTT Broker触发；DECIDED_APPROVED阶段由ActuatorController触发；DECIDED_REJECTED阶段由TelemetryStream触发。体现不同组件的申诉管辖权。
申诉解决后有两个结果：uphold维持原判回到DECIDED_APPROVED，overturn推翻回到DECIDED_REJECTED？还有AppealWithdrawn直接归档？
准确。另外需要补充取消机制：DRAFT阶段作者可以WithdrawnByAuthor；OPEN_FOR_VOTE阶段权威可以CancelledByAuthority。
已添加CANCELLED状态和两条取消路径。终态设计：REJECTED、ARCHIVED都指向TelemetryStream作为数据终点？
对，所有终止状态都汇聚到TelemetryStream进行数据持久化。现在需要为所有核心状态添加样式，使用橙色填充、粗体白色文字。
样式已应用。我检查一下：DRAFT、REVIEW、OPEN_FOR_VOTE、TALLYING、DECIDED_APPROVED、DECIDED_REJECTED、EXECUTION、EXECUTED、EXECUTION_FAILED、RETRY_EXEC、APPEAL、AUDIT、ARCHIVED、REJECTED、CANCELLED都已加入core类。
状态机标题应该是"SM-03.01 — Proposal Lifecycle (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic)"，体现这是PLC Logic主导的状态机。
标题已更新。我注意到EXECUTION到EXECUTED的转换标注有三个并行事件：PolicyChanged、GrantApproved、ProjectApproved，需要确认是否都保留？
保留，这代表三种不同的执行成功场景。另外检查下REVIEW的注释：Guard reviews (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic)，以及Can request changes or reject的描述是否准确。
已核实。整个状态机包含15个状态，约20条转换，覆盖了提案从创建到归档的完整生命周期，包括正常流程、申诉、取消、重试等异常路径。
最后确认一下组件交互边界：EdgeNode负责创建、投票触发、执行成功、申诉发起；ActuatorController负责投票记录、申诉触发、拒绝通知；MQTT Broker负责结果广播和投票期申诉；TelemetryStream负责审计和终态归档。
边界清晰。我补充一个细节：EXECUTION_FAILED的AppealOpened由EdgeNode触发，而DECIDED_REJECTED的AppealOpened由TelemetryStream触发，这种不对称设计是 intentional 的吗？
是 intentional 的。执行失败属于运行时异常，由EdgeNode就近处理；决策拒绝属于终态争议，由TelemetryStream作为审计方受理。体现分层治理思想。
理解。所有注释、状态、转换、样式、组件标注均已完整。最终检查通过，状态机SM-03.01已就绪。
很好。后续如果需要扩展，可以考虑在TALLYING阶段增加QuorumNotMet的分支，或者为APPEAL增加EscalatedToCouncil的升级路径。但目前这个版本已经覆盖了MVP需求。
已记录扩展点。当前版本完整实现了工业物联网场景下的提案生命周期管理，跨四个核心组件的协作逻辑清晰可追踪。
确认一下终态的指向符号：REJECTED -- [IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream] 和 ARCHIVED -- [IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream] 使用方括号表示组件终点，不是状态。
确认，方括号语法表示指向外部组件/系统边界，不是状态节点。这与Mermaid状态图中终态指向参与者的惯例一致。图示已完成。
